revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Category see also/Category pair check]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Category see also/Category pair check]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:55:32 on [[Template:Category see also/Category pair check]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |<!-- -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- it's on a century category -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- the link is to a similar century category -->[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use.
The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on?
If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]</noinclude>

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''

''BASEPAGENAME = {{BASEPAGENAME}}''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''

''BASEPAGENAME = {{BASEPAGENAME}}''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]-century|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''

''BASEPAGENAME = {{BASEPAGENAME}}''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

revision.comment: think I got it, so unsimplify
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''

''BASEPAGENAME = {{BASEPAGENAME}}''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''

''BASEPAGENAME = {{BASEPAGENAME}}''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''

match=[{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}
]{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |
''on a category page''

''BASEPAGENAME = {{BASEPAGENAME}}''
{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''

match="{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}"{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

''on a category page''

{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|
''on a century category''

''first param= [{{{1|}}}]''

match="{{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}"{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |<!-- -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- it's on a century category -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- the link is to a similar century category -->[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use.

If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]</noinclude>

If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]] }}</noinclude>

If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]] }}</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |<!-- -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- it's on a century category -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- the link is to a similar century category -->[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{doc|content= Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use.

If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]] }}</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |<!-- -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- it's on a century category -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- the link is to a similar century category -->[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use.
The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st{{!}}nd{{!}}rd{{!}}th)-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on?
If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:56:40 on [[Template:Category see also/Category pair check]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |<!-- -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- it's on a century category -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- the link is to a similar century category -->[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use.

If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]</noinclude>

match="{{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}"{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}|[[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]}}}}}}Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use. The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st|nd|rd|th))-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on? If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_see_also%2FCategory_pair_check here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_see_also%2FCategory_pair_check for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude><includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category |<!-- -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|%d+[snrt][tdh]%-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- it's on a century category -->{{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:String|match|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|-century.+$|ignore_errors=true}}|ignore_errors=true|plain=true}}<!-- -->|<!-- the link is to a similar century category --><!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{High-use}} Check whether [[Template:Category see also]] has been used when [[Template:Category pair]] probably should be use.
The test is: #Is this page in the Category namespace? #Does this page's title end in "nn(st{{!}}nd{{!}}rd{{!}}th)-century something" #does the first linked cat's title end in the same "-century something" as the title of the page it is used on?
If the answer to all 3 is yes, then categorise the page in the hidden tracking category [[:Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]] }} [[Category:Template Category see also used when Template Category pair probably should be]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
